# Synthetic audiobook-performance fixtures

Every fixture in this directory was written for this test suite and contains no
book, transcript, recording, or music from a third party.

- `synthetic_story.txt`, `.vtt`, and `.srt` are fictional test sentences.
- `synthetic_music_spec.json` describes an integer-generated PCM pulse track.
  Tests generate the WAV in a temporary directory; no source recording is used.

These fixtures may be redistributed with the repository.
